meaning: v.讲错,发错....的音,使讲得词不达意
examples: I ascertain me misspeak or being joking.
If you misspeak, and catch your mistake, immediately correct yourself by repeating the sentence correctly.
On Tuesday, Clinton told a news conference that the long grind of the presidential campaign had caused her to misspeak about the circumstances of the visit.
You know, I misspeak, and all of us do, and I think when you do then you want to make sure that you get that cleared up.
